# Usage Example:

**Query with Custom Directory:**
> Use project-creator skill to create a new Blazor Server project named "RequestManagement" with prefix "Sanjel" in the target directory "/sanjel/project".
**带自定义目录的提问：**
> 使用 project-creator skill，在目标目录 "/sanjel/project" 创建一个名为 "RequestManagement" 的 Blazor Server 项目，前缀为 "Sanjel"。
